data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of paying monthly regardless of attendance.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the explicit need for payment regardless of attendance. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that this specific requirement is satisfied. The existing bookings and financial outputs do not explicitly confirm that payments are made irrespective of attendance, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming that payments are made monthly regardless of attendance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
